title: Maru Ki
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Maru Ki''''' was an [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] that was involved in the [[Battle of To-phalion Base]]. It was also going to be the personal [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] during the battle. During the final attack by rogue Grand Admiral [[Demetrius Zaarin]] in his personal flagship the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial-class Star Destroyer]] [[Glory (Imperial-class)|''Glory'']], the ''Maru Ki'' suffered strong hull damage. Thrawn left the ship in a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|Lambda-class T-4a shuttle]] along with another shuttle containing officers. The ''Maru Ki'' survived the battle thanks to [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] who stalled the shielded [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptors]] long enough to allow the ''Maru Ki'' to escape into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].
